title: Amended
description: Backports the reworked creative inventory to earlier versions
body:
In 1.19.3, the creative inventory was reworked with big Quality of Life tweaks to the contents in the inventory, making it an easier experience to find relevant items and blocks.

This "resource pack" makes use of the [MoreCreativeTabs](https://modrinth.com/mod/morecreativetabs) mod by "backporting" the new creative inventory to earlier versions. MoreCreativeTabs is needed in order for the resource pack to work.

### Reworked Inventory Summary
- Blocks are ordered by material as much as possible.
- Some items can be found in more than one tab.
- Spawn eggs are relocated to their own tab.
- Dyes and dyed blocks are ordered in a gradient.
- Various tabs from the old inventory have been renamed or collapsed into others.

### Installation
This pack is made at which extraction is not required.
Once you have both the pack and the mod installed, you might need to run this command from the mod `/mct reloadTabs` in order for the new tabs to appear.
